text: Elastic Container Registry (ECR) @ tpssteamcantilio (©) adriancanil V * Managed Container image registry service ¢ .. like Docker hub .. but for AWS e Each AWS account has a public and private registry e Each registry can have many repositories ¢ Each repository can contain many images e Images can have several tags ¢ Public = public R/O .... R/W requires permissions ¢ Private = permissions required for any R/O or R/W
